(only MQla). Between the Second and third Schools there is full
agreement in respect of Naga, Gaja, Go and Jaradgava, and partial
agreement in respect of Airavata (with Magha added) Vrsabha
(with Magha removed),^ Aja (Visakha is the only common feature)
and Dahana (the two Asadhas are common) Mrga is completely
different in the two Schools. The following chart shows the Vithis
and their constituent asterism according to the three schools. The
stars are numbered form Asvini.
